curation.synopsis: Months ago the Imperial Fists relief fleet jumped the warp toward Isstvan III, intending to reinforce a campaign that no longer exists. They have not arrived. Stranded in the becalmed Phall system, Captain Alexis Polux holds the squadron together through warp-sickness and silence, waiting for Rogal Dorn's next order. When the Iron Warriors finally translate into Phall and answer an old grudge between primarchs with a fleet of their own, Polux is forced to fight the largest void battle of his life with ships designed for siege escort and a chain of command made of his own steadiness. The novella is at once a duel between the sons of Dorn and Perturabo and the forging of the captain who will lead the survivors of Rynn's World into history as the first Crimson Fist.
